metrics.name: failsafemlx_unsafe_auto_decision_rate
metrics.help: Fraction of high-risk predictions that were incorrectly auto-accepted.

metrics.name: failsafemlx_average_trust_score
metrics.help: Average reliability trust score across audited cases.

metrics.name: failsafemlx_human_review_rate
metrics.help: Fraction of audited cases routed to human review.

metrics.name: failsafemlx_provider_external_call_blocked_count
metrics.help: Whether external LLM providers were blocked by default in local validation.

metrics.name: failsafemlx_provider_external_api_call_used_count
metrics.help: Whether external API calls were used during local validation.

metrics.name: failsafemlx_dataset_validation_error_count
metrics.help: Dataset validation errors detected before reliability evaluation.

metrics.name: failsafemlx_dataset_validation_warning_count
metrics.help: Dataset validation warnings detected before reliability evaluation.

alert_recommendations.recommendation: Review failure taxonomy outputs and inspect drift/OOD or RAG evidence quality before expanding automation.
Filter stale or untrusted context, require citations, and rerun retrieval repair checks.

honest_limitations: Prometheus and Grafana were not started during local CI.
The dashboard JSON is a template suitable for later import, not evidence of live monitoring.
Alert thresholds are demonstration defaults and must be tuned for production use.
